title: Oxydectes magdalenensis
intro: Oxydectes magdalenensis, also known as Magdalena tree or False Pithya, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The health benefits of Oxydectes magdalenensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Oxydectes magdalenensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
uses: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on the medicinal uses of Oxydectes magdalenensis.
